tool_of_day.title: Gemini's new AI agent is about as good as Google's demo
tool_of_day.summary: Google's new "24/7" AI agent, Gemini Spark, can be shockingly good at doing things on your behalf.

hot_take: The AI industry is rapidly evolving, with companies like OpenAI and Anthropic going public, and new models like Gemini Spark being released, highlighting the need for developers to stay up-to-date with the latest trends and technologies.
